chunk_title: 1 - Confirm shipping address in Your Orders
source_file: Find a Missing Package that Shows a(2).md
chunk: Verify if your shipping address in Your Orders is correct. For more information on how to handle a wrong shipping address, go to Add and Manage Addresses.

chunk_title: 2 - Search for a notice of delivery attempt
source_file: Find a Missing Package that Shows a(2).md
chunk:
* Check the Message Center.
* Search for a delivery confirmation in Your Orders.
* Check your mailbox or wherever else you receive mail.
* Search for a delivery photo.

source_file: Find a Missing Package that Shows a(2).md
chunk: Check your delivery instructions in Your Addresses. The package could have been left where you requested.

chunk_title: 4 - Ask your household members and neighbors
source_file: Find a Missing Package that Shows a(2).md
chunk: Check if someone else accepted the delivery.

chunk_title: 5 - Wait 48 hours for the package to be delivered
source_file: Find a Missing Package that Shows a(2).md
chunk: Packages may be scanned as delivered before arrival.

chunk_title: 6 - You can check with the carrier
source_file: Find a Missing Package that Shows a(2).md
chunk: The carrier may have more information about the location of the package. To track your package on the carrier website or contact them, go to Carrier Contact Information.

Shipping items to a hotel may result in complications not covered by Amazon.
If you choose to ship an item to a hotel, the following policy applies:
Provide complete address details, check delivery times and communicate with the hotel.

chunk_title: About Items Shipped to Companies Not Affiliated with Amazon
source_file: About Items Shipped to Companies No(2).md
chunk:
Shipping items to a third-party company that isn’t affiliated with Amazon may result in complications not covered by Amazon.
Third-party companies that are not affiliated with Amazon include freight forwards, Buyer’s Clubs, third-party warehouses, and re-sellers. Amazon isn't responsible for any loss that occurs to items after the items are delivered to a third-party business and cannot issue refunds or replace these items.
For more information about freight forwarding, go to About Freight Forwarders and Hand Carry. For all other third-party companies:
* If an item arrives from Amazon with damaged packaging, please instruct the third-party company to refuse delivery. We'll issue a refund when the item is returned to Amazon.
* If an item arrives defective or damaged inside the packaging, go to Your Orders to view return options.
* If you received your package, but the item was missing from the box, go to Find a Missing Item from Your Order.
* If you have a missing package that shows as delivered, check with your third-party company. Follow the steps in Find a Missing Package that Shows as Delivered.
Amazon will not engage with a third-party company that did not make a purchase directly from Amazon.
Contact Amazon Customer Service if:
* The carrier delivered the item to the wrong address.
* You ordered a non-returnable item that was shipped in multiple boxes, and you only received a partial shipment.

* Inform the hotel. Let the front desk know that you’re expecting a package.
* Track your package. You can find tracking numbers and delivery updates in Your Orders. Visit the Tracking Your Package Help page for more details.
Amazon cannot issue refunds or replacements for packages that are delivered to a hotel but not received by the customer.
A delivery is considered successful once the package receives a delivery scan at the hotel’s front desk, concierge desk, or designated receiving area. This means Amazon will not provide a replacement or refund for any packages marked as delivered to these hotel locations but later reported missing by the guest.
For all other hotel deliveries where the package is successfully received by the customer, our standard return and refund policies still apply.

chunk_title: Amazon Shipment Updates via Text Updates Terms and Conditions
source_file: Amazon Shipment Updates via Text Up(2).md
chunk:
Amazon.com uses the short code 262966 to share shipment tracking updates.
If you agree to receive tracking updates through Amazon Shipment Updates via Text, you'll receive text messages when your package encounters an exception or delay. Confirm your subscription by replying YES to the subscription confirmation message that Amazon sends you upon signing up for the service.
Message and data rates may apply. Message frequency based on account orders. Text HELP to 262966 for Help. Text STOP to 262966 to cancel. For assistance, contact us.
Our participating carriers include (but aren't limited to): AT&T, SprintPCS, Metro PCS, T-Mobile®, U.S. Cellular®, Verizon Wireless.

* Contact the hotel. Ask them about their policies for accepting packages. Confirm whether they need any specific information to ensure that you successfully get your item. Ask about any related fees and how early you can send the item.
* Add details to your address. You can add a new address to your Address Book. You can also add or modify instructions to existing addresses by selecting Add Delivery Instructions or Edit on the desired address. Include the following details:
  * Recipient’s full name (name on the reservation)
  * Name of the hotel
* Check your delivery times. Make sure that your delivery date during checkout matches when you are at the location.

chunk_title: Check Your Push Notifications in the Amazon App
chunk: Go to the Amazon app > Your Account (Person icon in the bottom left corner of the app) > Settings (cog icon in the upper right hand corner of the app) > Notifications > Account and shipping. Turn on all for Push notifications.

chunk_title: Enable Push Notifications on Your Device
chunk:
For iOS:
* Ensure you have the Amazon app (Go to the App Store and search Amazon)
* Go to Settings > Notifications > Amazon > Allow Notifications
* Turn on “Time Sensitive Notifications” and select all alert options for best notification of delivery
For Android:
* Ensure you have the Amazon app (Go to the App Store and search Amazon)
* Go to Settings > Notifications > App Notifications > Amazon > Turn on
* Turn on “Time Sensitive Notifications” and select all alert options for best notification of delivery

source_file: Find a Missing Item from Your Order(2).md
chunk:
1. If the tracking info shows as delivered but you can't find the package, go to Find a Missing Package That Shows as Delivered for more information.
2. If the tracking info shows as undelivered, go to Undeliverable Packages.

chunk_title: Find a Missing Item from Your Order
source_file: Find a Missing Item from Your Order(2).md
chunk: If an item is missing from your package, it may have shipped separately. Check Your Orders.

chunk_title: Find a missing item shipped and sold by a third-party seller
source_file: Find a Missing Item from Your Order(2).md
chunk:
If the item missing from your package is shipped and sold by a third-party seller, contact the seller for assistance. Go to Contact a Third-Party Seller.
Learn how to identify orders shipped and sold by a seller by visiting Ordering from a third-party seller.

chunk_title: Find a missing item shipped by Amazon
source_file: Find a Missing Item from Your Order(2).md
chunk:
If you received your shipping package and an entire item shipped by Amazon is missing, do the following:
1. Go to Your Orders and check if the missing item is in another shipment.
2. Select Track Package to find the delivery date for the shipment.
3. If there is no tracking information for the missing item, Customer Service will assist you. Otherwise, you can follow the recommendations in this page.

chunk_title: Find a Missing Package that Shows as Delivered
chunk:
Follow the institution’s instructions for collecting packages in a timely manner. Look for any notifications sent to your phone or email.
If your package was scanned as Delivered but you didn’t receive a notification from your institution, check with the receiving department or receptionist. Have your name and tracking number ready before you speak with them.
Follow the steps in Find a Missing Package that Shows as Delivered.

chunk_title: Find a Missing Package that Shows as Delivered
source_file: Find a Missing Package that Shows a(2).md
chunk: Follow these steps if tracking shows a package as delivered in Your Orders but you can't find it.

Most issues can be fixed quickly. You can check what to do when:
* Order hasn't shipped yet: if you're expecting the package today and there isn't a status update, that's normal. Depending on the carrier, items may ship the same day they're delivered.
* Order is delayed: things like weather and traffic can cause delivery delays. Most late parcels arrive within 48 hours of the estimated delivery date. If the order has already been shipped, you can't cancel it.
* Missing package: if your package shows as delivered but you haven't received it, check the Find a missing package that shows as delivered page.
* Missing items: if you received a package that's missing an item, it may have been shipped separately. Check your orders, then refer to Find a missing item.
* To contact the company that's delivering your package, refer to Contact a carrier.

For late guaranteed deliveries, you're eligible to receive a delivery fee refund:
* Go to Your Orders and select your late order.
* Choose Problem with an order, then Shipping or delivery issues, and finally Shipment is late.
* If you have an item with a guaranteed delivery date that wasn't met, we'll provide a refund of the shipping fees.

chunk_title: How we’ll contact you if a delivery is late
chunk:
If Amazon delivers the order, we’ll update your tracking with real-time information about where your package is. We’ll email you when we know there’s a delay. You’ll also find all correspondence in the Message Center.
For orders delivered by a delivery carrier, we’ll still update your Amazon order tracker. Your carrier will have the latest information. Contact your carrier directly for shipping updates. You can also check their website, emails, or mobile app for tracking information.

chunk_title: If 48 hours have passed since your estimated delivery date
chunk:
If there's still been no news after 48 hours:
* For orders shipped by Amazon, contact Customer Service within 30 days of the estimated delivery date.
* Contact the seller if a third-party seller shipped and sold your order.

What to do if your order didn't arrive on the estimated delivery date.
On this page:
* What to do if your delivery is late
* Why some deliveries are delayed
* How we’ll contact you if a delivery is late
* Why wait for 48 hours
* If 48 hours have passed since your estimated delivery date
* Guaranteed deliveries
A useable tracking number may not be available on your order or return.

chunk_title: Not what you’re looking for? Try these pages
chunk:
* Find a Missing Package That Shows as Delivered
* Late Deliveries
* Replace a Damaged, Defective, or Broken Item
* Find a Missing Item from Your Package

chunk_title: Orders Sold and Fulfilled by Amazon
chunk:
A tracking number may not be on your order yet because it could still be on the way to the carrier. When the carrier scans your order the first time, you will have tracking details in Your Orders.
If no tracking is available and you need to return or exchange your order, wait for the estimated delivery date to pass. You'll be able to return or replace your order by visiting the Online Returns Center.

chunk_title: Orders Sold and Fulfilled by Third-Party Sellers
chunk:
Seller orders can also be tracked, but only if the seller has shared this information with Amazon and you've chosen a traceable shipping method.
If a Track package option is not available, contact the seller as follows:
1. Go to Your Orders.
2. Find your order in the list.
3. Select Problem with Order.
4. Choose your topic from list displayed.
5. Select Contact Seller.
Allow two days for the seller to respond. In most cases you'll receive a reply sooner.

chunk_title: Part of an item is missing
source_file: Find a Missing Item from Your Order(2).md
chunk:
Double check to confirm that the part is missing from the product packaging. If you can’t find it, contact the product's manufacturer for assistance.
Manufacturer contact information can be found on the product packaging, in the paperwork included with the product, or by searching the Internet.
If you can't find contact information, or if they can't help, you can return the item. Go to Your Orders and select Return or Replace Items.

You can set up or edit push notifications to track your orders.
To receive push notifications for shipment tracking, ensure your phone settings allow app notifications and then turn on push notifications in the Amazon app.

An undeliverable status occurs for various reasons including, but not limited:
* The shipment sustains damage before or during transit.
* The shipment is detected to contain products with quality issues.
* The shipping address can’t be accessed due to wrong address, missing information, or delivery restrictions (ex: correctional facility) or driver safety concerns due to presence of a dog. Visit Your Addresses to update your shipping addresses and add any delivery preferences. Customize instructions to include access codes, presence of dog, and preferred days of delivery for future orders.
* The shipping label becomes unreadable during transit.
* The carrier makes three unsuccessful attempts to access your delivery address.
* Customer/recipient refuses to accept package from carrier.

chunk_title: Reasons Why Your Tracking Information Is Not Available
chunk:
* Your package has not been scanned by the carrier. Issues like this can happen when shipping volume is high and packages are processed in bulk. Until this first scan, the carrier may not acknowledge receipt of the package.
* There may be a delay in updates to the tracking database.
* Some shipments, such as Standard International shipments, aren't trackable.
* Marketplace sellers don't always provide us with tracking information for their orders.
* The order is a gift. You will receive a gift receipt once the order is delivered. Until that time, the gift purchaser will receive the tracking updates.

You can expect a refund within 7 business days after the return is received. Some issuing banks may require an additional 3-5 business days to process a refund.
Visit the Refunds Help page for more information about refunds processing times.
Undeliverable Orders Shipped and Sold by Sellers
If your order is shipped and sold by a third-party seller, contact the seller directly for assistance.
If you’re not satisfied with the seller solution or you don’t hear back from them within two business days, you may be eligible for a refund through Amazon's A-to-z Guarantee.
For more information about third-party sellers, visit Ordering from a Third-Party Seller.

* Track Your Package

chunk_title: Sign Up for and Manage Shipment Updates via Text for All Orders
source_file: Sign Up for and Manage Shipment Upd(2).md
chunk:
You can sign up to receive tracking information for your orders via text message when there are exceptions or delays
To sign up for or cancel shipment updates via text, or change your phone number:
1. Go to Your Account.
2. Select Shipment updates via text under the Communication and content section.
Note: Shipment updates via text are only available for packages shipped by Amazon.com sellers.

You can find tracking numbers and delivery updates in Your Orders.
To get tracking numbers and delivery updates:
* Check Your Orders
* Find the order that you want to track
* Select Track package next to your order
* Select All updates to get:
  * delivery updates
  * tracking numbers
  * 
If you ordered more than one thing, they may have separate delivery dates and tracking info. Some packages, like standard international deliveries, might not be trackable.

Third-party sellers at Amazon are independent businesses or individuals that sell their products on Amazon Marketplace. To check if you ordered from a third-party seller, refer to Your Orders and review the seller name.
You can only access tracking information if:
* the third-party seller shares this info with us
* you chose a trackable shipping option
To get help, refer to Contacting a third-party seller.
Your return order status can be tracked by selecting View Return/Refund Status next to the relevant order. Go to Return Items You Ordered for more information.

chunk_title: Turn Off Shipment Updates via Text for a Specific Package
source_file: Turn Off Shipment Updates via Text(2).md
chunk:
You can turn off Shipment Updates via Text for a specific package at any time.
To turn off Shipment Updates via Text for a specific package:
1. Go to Your Orders.
2. Select Track your package for the package for which you want to turn off shipment updates via text. You'll see the option to turn off Shipment Updates via Text for that package.
Note: You may still receive a text message after you unsubscribe, if we sent text messages that haven't reached you.
This happens when an unplanned service disruption prevents us from delivering your package. We’ll notify you and refund you for the items you didn’t receive.

Your delivery status is in Your Orders:
* Arriving: usually followed by a date. Your package is on its way to you
* Out for delivery: your package will be delivered today
* Delivered: your package has been delivered, and might be in your safe space
* Undeliverable: your package couldn't be delivered, and will be returned to Amazon. When we receive it, we'll automatically issue you a refund. Visit the Undeliverable packages help page.

We automatically notify you. The undeliverable package is returned to Amazon, and we’ll process your refund.
When a package is returned as undeliverable, we can't reship it. You can place a new order for the item(s).
To stay on top of delivery changes, consider signing up to receive shipment updates via text message.

chunk_title: What to do if your delivery is late
chunk:
If your Amazon delivery is late:
* Track the package for status updates.
* Check your email for carrier notifications.
* Allow 48 hours past the estimated delivery date for unexpected delays.

source_file: Find a Missing Package that Shows a(2).md
chunk:
If you have not located the package after following the steps above, you can:
If your order is shipped and sold by a third-party seller, contact the seller directly for assistance. Go to Contact a Third-Party Seller.
If your order was shipped by Amazon, contact Customer Service within 30 days of expected delivery. We'll do everything we can to help.

Common reasons for late deliveries include:
* Bad weather
* Heavy traffic
* High delivery demand during holidays
* Custom delays for international packages
* Operational problems like a vehicle breaking down

Most deliveries arrive within 48 hours. If you haven’t received an email or notification about the delay, wait 48 hours as it may nearly be delivered.
After 48 hours have passed, Customer Services will be able to help you.

source_file: Find a Missing Item from Your Order(2).md
chunk:
* If your order is shipped and sold by a third-party seller and you receive an empty shipping package, contact the seller directly for assistance. Visit Contact a Third-Party Seller.
* If your order was shipped by Amazon and you receive an empty shipping package, contact our Customer Service within 30 days of expected delivery. We'll do everything we can to help.

Amazon is committed to making shopping seamless and worry-free. Customers may return eligible items when purchases do not meet expectations or needs change. Most items sold on Amazon.com can be returned within 30 days of delivery for: - Refund - Replacement - Exchange Items must generally be: - In original condition - Unused - Returned with original packaging and accessories Customers should review return eligibility: - On the product detail page before purchase - In Order History after placing an order Eligible items may qualify for: - Free returns - Nearby drop-off locations - Box-free returns - Label-free returns

A refund is issued after: 1. Amazon or the third-party seller receives the returned item 2. The item is inspected 3. The return is approved Return processing may take: - Up to 30 days under normal conditions - Longer in exceptional situations If additional information is required, Amazon contacts the customer with further instructions. Customers may also use Amazon support resources for: - Missing packages - Refund assistance - Product support - A-to-z Guarantee claims involving third-party sellers
Most items sold on Amazon.com can be returned within 30 days of delivery.

Applicable to: - Kindle books accidentally purchased from the Kindle Store that have not been read - Digital textbooks, workbooks, and educational content that have not been downloaded - Songs or albums accidentally purchased using Alexa from the Digital Music Store

Applicable to: - Apple brand products sold in new condition - Boost Infinite brand products sold in new condition - Amazon Haul items priced above $3 Notes: - AppleCare+ cancellations follow plan terms - Amazon Haul items priced at $3 or less are non-returnable and non-refundable

Applicable to: - Select Amazon Renewed items in Acceptable, Good, or Excellent condition - Most nonperishable baby products - Amazon Birthday Registry purchases made by someone other than the registry owner - Custom Gift List purchases - Mattresses excluding crib mattresses

A 180-day return window applies to: - Amazon Wedding Registry purchases made by someone other than the registry owner A 365-day return window applies to: - Amazon Renewed Premium products - Amazon Baby Registry purchases made by someone other than the registry owner

Some items cannot be returned or refunded. These include: - Perishable products - Products posing health or safety risks - Products with shipping restrictions - Customized or personalized products - Redeemable products - Amazon Pharmacy products - Pet medication products - Certain digital products - Automobiles

Products labeled as “Final Sale” are: - Non-returnable - Non-refundable Examples include: - Trading card games - Certain discounted items - Amazon Haul items priced at $3 or less If a non-returnable or Final Sale item arrives: - Damaged - Defective - Materially different from the order Customers should contact Customer Service for assistance.

To initiate a return: 1. Go to Your Orders 2. Select “Return Items” beside the eligible item Amazon supports: - Over 8,000 return locations - Free returns for eligible items - Box-free returns - Label-free returns Most return locations are within a 5-mile radius of customer addresses.

Returned items should include: - Original manufacturer packaging - Tags - Accessories - Components - Manuals - Certificates of authenticity - Inserts Additionally: - Hygiene seals and liners must remain intact - Items should be unused or in original condition Items must be returned before the “return by date” shown in: - Return confirmation emails - Return Request section in Order History

Customers should: - Follow return instructions for each item - Avoid combining items from separate orders in the same package Before returning electronics or devices containing personal information: - Completely erase stored data - Follow manufacturer instructions Examples include: - Computers - Phones - Electronics If a refund is issued before the item is returned: - Customers may be charged if the item is not sent back Charges are reversed once Amazon processes the returned item. Defective hazardous items must be returned through instructions provided in the Online Returns Center.

Most items include at least one free return shipping option. Fees may apply when: - Selecting a paid shipping or drop-off option - Returning heavy or bulky items - Having an unusually high return rate The fee amount varies depending on: - Item type - Shipping method - Size and handling requirements

Customers may incur fees if they do not complete the return before the return-by date. Fee structure: - 20% of the item price during the first 30 days after the return-by date - 100% of the item price after that period

Damage fees may apply if returned items: - Are damaged - Are missing parts - Are not in original condition - Have removed tags - Show obvious signs of use Fees can be: - Up to 50% of the item price - 100% of the item price for Amazon Luxury items

A 100% restocking fee may apply for: - Opened software - Activated video games - Used games missing parts - Opened collectible cards - Board games - Collectible figurines with missing parts or packaging

All returned items are inspected before refunds are issued. Refunds may be reduced because of: - Customer use - Damage - Missing accessories - Missing manuals - Missing parts For currency-converted orders: - Refunds are issued in local currency - Original exchange rates are used

Refunds are processed after: 1. Amazon receives the returned item 2. The item is inspected 3. The refund is approved Customers receive email notifications with detailed refund summaries after refunds are issued.

Estimated refund timelines vary by payment method: - Amazon Gift Card: 2–3 hours - Credit Card: 3–5 business days - Shop with Reward Points: up to 5 business days - Debit Card: up to 10 business days - Checking Account: up to 10 business days - EBT Card: up to 10 business days - Cash at Participating Locations: up to 10 business days - Prepaid Credit Card: up to 30 days depending on issuer - Promotional Certificate: no refund issued
Advanced refunds are issued when the carrier first scans the return instead of waiting for Amazon to receive and process the returned item.
If the original payment method cannot receive the refund, such as an expired card, Amazon issues the refund to the customer’s Amazon account balance.
Partial refunds may apply when returned items are: - Used - Damaged - Missing parts Gift return refunds are issued to the person who initiated the return request.
Customers can track returns using: - Return confirmation emails - Carrier tracking numbers - Your Returns section in their Amazon account
To track a return: 1. Go to Your Returns 2. Locate the item under Last 3 Months 3. Review return and refund details

Return statuses include: - Return Requested on [DATE]: Amazon accepted the return request and is waiting to receive the item. - Refund Issued: Amazon processed the return and issued a refund. - Item No Longer Eligible for Return: The item exceeded the return eligibility window.

Customers can check refund status using: - Return/Refund Status links in confirmation emails - Your Returns section After refunds are issued: - Refund details become visible - Customers receive refund summary emails - Refund transactions appear in Your Transactions

Gift Recipient Returns: Refunds are issued to the Amazon gift card balance of the account used to create the return request. Gift Purchaser Returns: Refunds are issued to the refund method selected in the Online Returns Center.
Amazon Pharmacy purchases are: - Non-returnable - Non-refundable Customers should consult Amazon Pharmacy Help for additional assistance.

Standard Amazon return policies also apply to Amazon Business purchases. Programs such as: - Spot Buys - Custom Quote purchases may have separate terms and conditions. Customers should consult: - Amazon Business Accounts Terms and Conditions - Feature Terms and Conditions
Amazon Luxury purchases may have: - Specialized support processes - Different damage fee structures Customers should use the Amazon Luxury Help Page for assistance.

For items fulfilled and shipped by third-party sellers: - Returns are sent directly to the seller instead of Amazon Third-party sellers must provide one of the following: - A U.S. return address - A prepaid return label - A full refund without requiring the item to be returned
Customers experiencing issues with: - Third-party sellers - Seller-shipped products - Seller-related disputes may use Amazon’s A-to-z Guarantee protection program.
Customers shipping from Amazon.com to Canada may return eligible purchases using prepaid UPS drop-off labels. Customers can locate nearby UPS drop-off locations using UPS services.

Amazon supports DHL Express return services in select countries. Available options include: - DHL drop-off locations - DHL Express pickup scheduling Customers selecting pickup services receive confirmation emails with return instructions and may schedule pickup through MyDHL+.

Customers may return items using shipping services paid at their own expense. Amazon may reimburse up to $25 in return postage costs depending on: - Country - Return eligibility Customers can track return progress through Your Orders.

Heavy or bulky items include products that: - Weigh 50 pounds or more - Exceed 59 inches on the longest side - Exceed 130 inches in girth These returns may: - Incur variable return shipping fees - Require specialty carrier pickup appointments - Require home collection services Additional seller fees may apply for third-party seller returns.
If customers return items that were part of discount qualification offers, refund amounts may be reduced to account for discount adjustments.

Customers may initiate gift returns using: - A 17-digit order number - Packing slips - Digital gift receipts If the order number is unavailable, customers should contact the gift giver. Gift exchanges and replacements require: - Returning the original gift - Placing a new order Gifted Kindle books may be exchanged for Amazon.com Gift Cards before acceptance.
Items purchased in a Bundle with Savings promotion must be returned together. Partial refunds are not available for partial bundle returns.

Customers may request replacements through Your Orders by selecting “Return or replace items.” Replacement orders: - Use the same shipping speed as the original order - Require return of the original item before the return-by date - May depend on stock availability If replacements are unavailable or the item was received as a gift: - Customers must return the item - Place a new order instead
Amazon may request photos showing product damage during replacement requests. Images should clearly display the damage to support return and replacement processing.

Customers can cancel: - Physical items - Orders that have not entered the shipping process Orders sold and shipped by third-party sellers may usually be canceled within one business day. Once orders enter fulfillment: - Seller approval may be required To cancel an order: 1. Go to Your Orders 2. Select View or Edit Order 3. Select Cancel Items 4. Choose items to cancel 5. Select a cancellation reason 6. Submit the cancellation request

If Amazon-shipped orders cannot be canceled: - Customers should refuse delivery - Or return the package through the Online Returns Center If third-party seller orders cannot be canceled: - Customers should contact the seller directly

Customers may update: - Order quantity - Billing address - Delivery address - Payment method Changes are allowed only before dispatch. To modify an order: 1. Go to Your Orders 2. Select Order Details 3. Select Change beside the information to update 4. Follow the on-screen instructions Mobile devices may only support order cancellation functions.

chunk_title: Third-Party Seller and Amazon Fresh Order Changes
chunk: To update shipping addresses for third-party seller orders: - Customers must contact the seller - Cancellation and reordering may be required Amazon Fresh and Whole Foods deliveries may support: - Adding items - Delivery modifications through dedicated delivery management pages.

To close an Amazon account and delete personal information: 1. Go to Close Your Amazon Account 2. Sign into the account 3. Review associated products and services 4. Select a closure reason 5. Confirm account closure 6. Verify the request through email or text confirmation within five days Customers with multiple Amazon accounts must submit separate closure requests for each account.

After account closure: - Access to Amazon services across global Amazon sites is removed - Seller accounts, Brand Registry accounts, and Advertising accounts become inaccessible - Closed accounts cannot be restored Customers wishing to use Amazon again must create a new account.

Customers can check Amazon Gift Card balances through Your Account. To check balances: 1. Go to Your Account 2. Select Gift Cards Some physical gift cards may not display printed balances. Customers may verify balances by: - Comparing serial numbers from Your Orders - Reviewing Balance Page transaction history Gift card balances do not include promotional certificates.

Amazon takes fraud, phishing, spoofing, and scam attempts seriously. Customers should report suspicious communications immediately. Reporting categories include: - No information shared - Shared Amazon account information - Shared banking information - Granted remote device access - Shared other personal information

chunk_title: Reporting Scams Without an Amazon Account
chunk: People without Amazon accounts may still report suspicious communications to: reportascam@amazon.com Sending suspicious emails or messages as attachments helps Amazon investigate scam activity. Amazon may send automatic confirmation emails but may not respond personally.

Customers may report suspicious phone calls or text messages to the Federal Trade Commission (FTC) using official FTC fraud reporting tools. Customers concerned about account security should review Amazon’s Protect Your System help resources.

chunk_title: Reporting Suspicious Products and Gift Card Fraud
chunk: Customers can report: - Suspicious products - Suspicious sellers - Unsolicited packages - Brushing scams - Gift card fraud or abuse Additional guidance is available through Amazon Trustworthy Shopping resources.
